title: Terrible recommendation algorithm lately
text: Honestly, what happened to the Spotify recommendation algorithm? Discover Weekly used to find me such hidden gems. Now it's just repeating the same 10 songs I listened to last week or pushing major label pop artists that I have absolutely zero interest in. I am paying for premium and expected a lot better than this lazy looping. Please fix your algorithms, they are stuck in a loop.
author: Alex M.

title: Great app, but shuffle isn't random
text: I love Spotify and have been a user for 5 years. But the shuffle feature is definitely not random. It always plays the same songs from my 500-song playlist. I've noticed it prioritizes tracks I recently liked or skipped less. True randomness would make discovery so much better.
author: Jessica K.

title: Too expensive for repeating songs
text: The price has gone up twice recently, and for what? The Smart Shuffle is incredibly annoying, it injects songs that have nothing to do with my vibe. And my daily mix is just the same songs over and over. I feel like I'm stuck in an algorithm feedback loop.
author: David L.

title: Best music discovery platform!
text: I've discovered so many new indie artists through the Release Radar and radio features. Spotify's ability to match my music taste is unmatched compared to Apple Music. Happy premium subscriber here.
author: Chloe P.

title: Smart Shuffle is a disaster
text: Smart shuffle is anything but smart. It keeps recommending mainstream garbage that completely ruins my curated playlists. Just give me a normal shuffle without these forced recommendation algorithm inserts.
author: Ryan T.

title: Excellent playlist suggestions
text: I really enjoy the 'enhance' and recommended songs at the bottom of my playlists. The AI DJ is also quite cool, though it sometimes talks a bit too much. Overall, the best app for finding new music.
author: Sarah G.

title: Algorithm is broken
text: My discover weekly has been trash for the last three months. It suggests songs in languages I don't speak, or genres I never listen to. It seems the recommendation engine has lost its touch.
author: Liam W.

title: Love the local files feature and discovery
text: It is very easy to upload local files, and the app seamlessly integrates them into my playlists. Combined with excellent daily discovery feeds, this is my favorite app.
author: Emma B.

title: Not happy with the new UI
text: The new UI makes it harder to access my library, and they are constantly pushing recommendations on the home feed. I just want to listen to my saved albums without being forced to discover new music every second.
author: Oliver H.

title: Discovered my new favorite bands here
text: The recommendation radio that plays after a playlist finishes is amazing. It has introduced me to so many small creators. I appreciate how Spotify gives visibility to new artists.
author: Sophia J.

title: Stuck on the same songs
text: Why does Spotify keep recommending songs that are already in my heavy rotation? The 'Discover' tab is just repeating songs from my playlists. This isn't discovery, it's just an echo chamber.
author: Lucas V.

title: Good music app
text: Excellent stream quality, and I really like the social features like Blend. It makes discovering music with friends super interactive and fun.
author: Mia C.

title: Paid premium but still get ads in podcasts
text: It makes no sense that I pay for premium to avoid ads, but when I listen to recommended podcasts, I'm bombarded with ads. Very annoying experience.
author: Ethan R.

title: AI DJ has improved my discovery
text: The AI DJ has been surprisingly good at picking up on my daily mood swings and playing music that fits. It has helped me discover tracks I would have never clicked on myself.
author: Isabella S.

title: Discovery is dead on Spotify
text: It feels like the recommendations are heavily paid for by big labels now. The same 5 mainstream songs are pushed on every playlist I generate. Time to switch to tidal or bandcamp for real music discovery.
author: Noah K.

title: Amazing recommendation engine
text: Spotify knows my taste better than I do. Release Radar every Friday is a ritual for me. I always find 3-4 new tracks to add to my favorites list.
author: Lily H.

title: Shuffle keeps playing the same artist
text: Whenever I hit shuffle on my liked songs, it plays 3-4 songs by the same artist back-to-back. The algorithm is definitely biased and lacks a broad range.
author: Mason F.

title: Very convenient
text: Smooth UI, works on all my devices, and the recommendation system is generally decent. I just wish we had high-fidelity audio options like other streaming platforms.
author: Zoe D.

title: Tired of the podcast push
text: I use Spotify for music. Stop cluttering my home screen with recommended podcasts that I don't care about. The music discovery algorithm is suffering because of this.
author: Jack B.

title: Best way to find new music
text: The custom mixes (genre mixes, decade mixes) are fantastic. They do a great job of blending music I already know with fresh recommendations.
author: Grace Y.

title: Algorithms feel stale
text: I feel like I've reached the end of Spotify's recommendation capability. For the past month, every recommendation playlist has been a minor variation of the same songs. It has stopped discovering new styles for me.
author: James P.

title: Awesome interface
text: Finding new songs is incredibly easy. I use the search search terms and browse categories, and the app serves up great curated content. Love it.
author: Emily E.

title: Recommendations are off
text: Lately my daily mixes are filled with tracks I've specifically hid or skipped multiple times. The algorithm doesn't seem to learn from my negative feedback.
author: Henry C.

title: Simply the best
text: I've tried apple music and amazon music, but Spotify's recommendation algorithm is still the gold standard. The playlist customization is excellent.
author: Abigail R.

title: Repetitive recommendations
text: No matter what search term I use or how many new artists I listen to, my Discover Weekly is stuck in a loop of recommending the same indie-pop songs. I need more variety.
author: Daniel O.

title: Seamless syncing and great suggestions
text: The connect feature is a lifesaver. I can switch from phone to PC instantly. Recommended tracks are usually very accurate and fit my playlist themes.
author: Madison W.

title: Smart Shuffle ruins playlists
text: Every time I turn on my playlist, it defaults to Smart Shuffle. It keeps recommending songs that do not match the genre of my playlist at all. Let me disable it permanently.
author: Samuel Q.

title: Very happy customer
text: I love the new music release notifications and how the app guides me to artists I might like. Premium is totally worth it.
author: Ella N.

title: Terrible customer support and bad algorithm loop
text: I had billing issues and support was useless. Also, the app keeps repeating the same recommended playlist on my home feed. Not recommended.
author: Sebastian J.

title: Great daily mixes
text: The daily mixes are perfectly tailored to different moods. They do a great job of helping me find new music in genres I don't usually listen to.
author: Victoria H.
